metadata.description: Blog marketing skills for Claude Code: SEO + GEO optimization of blog posts, built on top of the aaron-marketing skill pack.

plugins.name: blog-marketing
plugins.description: Generate and optimize blog posts: the roadtrip-blogger agent writes complete, non-duplicating North American road-trip posts in your site's own format; the blog-seo-geo skill optimizes any local post (HTML/Markdown, fragments included) for SEO and GEO via aaron-marketing, with fail-closed integrity checks and a number-fabrication guard.
